calendar.matters:
Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Jul-07-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Continued To Apr-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Richard Lucia.
Ed Otonello for and with Carol Kunkle (Trustee).

The Court noted that at the last hearing Ms. Kunkle was ordered to provide an accounting, that a proposed order was to be provided to the Court and that it has not received a form of order. Ms. Ebey stated that the accounting was received, that she feels it was inadequate, that she still has a little bit of discovery (subpoenas/depositions) to do, that she will then be ready for mediation and suggested a two-month continuance. Mr. Otonello stated that he does not think two months is enough time to get discovery and mediation done. The Petition for Accounting for Actions Taken Under Power of Attorney is continued to April 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A joint status statement is to be filed by April 7, 2020.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petitioners Notice Of Motion To Compel Nonparty Wells Fargo Bank National Association To Appear And Produce Records In Compliance With Deposition Subpoena And For A Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Text Ruling

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Nov-12-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Richard Lucia (Petitioner).
Edward Otonello for and with Carol Kunkle (Respondent/Trustee).

Ms. Ebey stated that she is the second Attorney, that there were discussions early on about mediation, that she has subpoenaed documents and is still in the middle of the subpoenas, that they had discussion as to when the accounting will be provided and that she would like an accounting from 10/31/2013 when Ms. Kunkle had power of attorney to 10/14/2016 when the Settlor resigned as Trustee. Mr. Otonello stated that the Settlor continued to manage the accounts during the time Ms. Kunkle had power of attorney, that he received written interrogatories, that the Trustee is asking for identification of documents and that he needs to do discovery. The Court orders that Ms. Kunkle provide an accounting by December 13, 2019 from the time she officially became the Trustee. The Petition for Accounting for Actions Taken Under Power of Attorney is continued to January 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to submit a joint status statement by January 7, 2020. Ms. Ebey is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Continued To Nov-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Continued To Oct-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Continued To Jul-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aaron Feldman for and with Petitioner.
Edward Otonello fpr and with Carol Kunkle.

Counsel stated that no other parties are entitled to notice. Mr. Otonello argued that CCP 1014 does not apply here. The Court noted that Ms. Kunkle is present and that she has responded, and asks the parties how they want to proceed. Mr. Otonello stated that he is prepared to go to mediation. Mr. Feldman stated that they are having some difficulty with obtaining some records, that they are having problems with Wells Fargo Bank, and that mediation would be excellent once they have records. Mr. Otonello stated that he also wants to do some discovery. The Petition for Accounting for Actions Taken Under Power of Attorney is continued to July 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a referral to mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Accounting For Actions Taken Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aaron Feldman appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Edward Ottonello for and with Carol Kunkle (Respondent).

The Court noted that an amended petition was filed, but there is no proof of notice of it. Mr. Feldman apologized to the Court, stated that he was unclear as to other issues and forgot about notice, and that he gave notice, but did not file it. Mr. Feldman also stated that he was not sure if an additional amendment was needed to allege issues outside of trust and that he is not sure if he provided notice directly to the Respondent. The Petition for Accounting for Actions Taken Under Power of Attorney is continued to April 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Feldman is to make sure all procedural issues are addressed and make a determination as to how to proceed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
